zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Berkeley於大約1160年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾時，她的父親Maurice FitzRobert42歲，母親Alice Berkeley29歲。她於大約1177年與Elias Giffard在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1189年在英國米德萊可布倫特福德享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud Berkeley于大约1160年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Maurice FitzRobert42岁，母亲Alice Berkeley29岁。她于大约1177年与Elias Giffard在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1189年在英国米德萊可布倫特福德享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Berkeley was born about 1160, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Maurice FitzRobert, was 42 and her mother, Alice Berkeley, was 29. She married Elias Giffard about 1177, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1189, in Brentford, Middlesex, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Berkeley est née environ 1160, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Maurice FitzRobert, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice Berkeley, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Elias Giffard environ 1177, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1189, à Brentford, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Berkeley um 1160 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Maurice FitzRobert 42 und ihre Mutter Alice Berkeley 29. Sie hat um 1177 in Gloucestershire, England Elias Giffard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1189 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Brentford, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Berkeley è nata il circa 1160 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Maurice FitzRobert, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Alice Berkeley, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Elias Giffard circa 1177, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1189, nel Brentford, Middlesex, England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Berkeleyが約1160年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Maurice FitzRobertは42歳，母Alice Berkeleyは29歳であった。約1177年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでElias Giffardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1189年にイギリスミッドレセックスブレントフォードで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Berkeley(이)가 대략 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Maurice FitzRobert(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Berkeley(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1177년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Elias Giffard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1189년 영국 미들레세스 브렌트퍼드에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Berkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Maurice FitzRobert, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alice Berkeley, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Elias Giffard aproximadamente 1177, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1189, em Brentford, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Berkeley родилась около 1160 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Maurice FitzRobert было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Berkeley, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Elias Giffard около 1177 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1189 г. в местности брентфорд, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud Berkeley nació aproximadamente 1160, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Maurice FitzRobert, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Alice Berkeley, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elias Giffard aproximadamente 1177, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1189, en Brentford, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
